steps.title: Compute the mean
steps.content:
The total frequency is $a+3a+5a+3a+a=13a$. The weighted sum is
$$1(a)+2(3a)+3(5a)+4(3a)+5(a)=39a$$
So the mean is
$$\frac{39a}{13a}=3$$

steps.title: Locate the median
steps.content: The values below $3$ have total frequency $a+3a=4a$. The values equal to $3$ have frequency $5a$, so the middle value or values fall in the group with value $3$.

steps.title: Compare the measures
steps.content:
The mean and median are both $3$, so the mean is greater than the median by
$$3-3=0$$
The answer is A.
